en.name: Jigsaw Puzzle
en.desc: Classic jigsaw puzzle fun! Drag pieces to complete beautiful images. Multiple difficulty levels from easy 4x4 to challenging 10x10 grids.

zh.name: 拼图游戏
zh.desc: 经典拼图乐趣！拖动碎片完成美丽图片。多种难度从简单4x4到挑战性10x10网格。
zh.howToPlay: Click on a piece to select it, then click another piece to swap their positions. Arrange all pieces in numerical order to complete the puzzle. Try to minimize moves and time.
tips: Start by placing corner and edge pieces
Look for sequential numbers that are close together
Use the preview image as reference
Work on one section at a time
